---
title: "test_sv_engine_empire.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\quarantine\test_sv_engine_empire.py"
loc: 36
complexity: 3
logic_score: 4.57
style_score: 3.39
intel_score: 2.51
overall_score: 3.15
---

## Intent
The `test_sv_engine_empire.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on TestSovereignEngineEmpire, test_init, test_proactive_lexicon_lift. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via TestSovereignEngineEmpire, test_init, test_proactive_lexicon_lift. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 4.6/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.4/10
- **Intel [I]**: 2.5/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 7 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [sys](file://sys)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [unittest.mock](file://unittest.mock)
- [pytest](file://pytest)
- [src.core.sv_engine](file://src.core.sv_engine)

### Exports
- `TestSovereignEngineEmpire`
- `test_init`
- `test_proactive_lexicon_lift`
